query:
SELECT EXISTS(
            SELECT 1 FROM items i
            JOIN media_parts mp ON mp.item_id = i.id AND mp.server_id = i.server_id
            WHERE i.guid = $1
              AND i.item_type = 'movie'
              AND (mp.video_resolution ILIKE $2 OR mp.video_resolution ILIKE '%2160%')
        ) AS "exists!"
